@graph.description: Inositol hexanicotinate is a flush-free niacin form that is better tolerated but does not reliably reproduce nicotinic acid's lipid effects. Evidence supports caution against treating it as an equivalent niacin substitute.
@graph.name: Inositol Hexanicotinate
